_comment: Pa11y configuration for the ICCC accessibility check workflow.
chromeLaunchConfig sets --no-sandbox for GitHub Actions runner.
The ignore list is empty. Both pre-existing AAA failures that were
previously suppressed here have been fixed in the accessibility-phase
Fixed by adding aria-label='Upload images for analysis' to #file-input
Fixed by correcting the --fg-muted comment in src/styles.css to reflect
the actual contrast ratios: 7.98:1 on --bg (#f4f6f8) and 7.71:1 on
--neutral-bg. The colour value #454c58 already met the 7:1 AAA threshold.
No Level A codes are suppressed here.
